title: Automatic Recurring Due Date Updates
excerpt: I am trying to figure out a way to automatically update the due date of all items on a board when the month changes. For example; if the current due date is June 5th, when the current date changes to July 1st, I want the…

posts.author: Jacobweber123 (Jacob Weber)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to figure out a way to automatically update the due date of all items on a board when the month changes. For example; if the current due date is June 5th, when the current date changes to July 1st, I want the due date to change to July 5th.
